summary: SINGLE_FOCUS IFS chaos game with 3 equal-probability contraction maps f_i(x)=(x+v_i)/2 toward 3 triangle vertices (RED/GREEN/BLUE) reveals Sierpinski attractor. 8000 pre-computed iterates colored by which map was used. ValueTracker n_tr sweeps 0→8000 with add_updater fading in dots. Banach fixed-point guarantees unique attractor.
